Reasoning: The patient's current hospital visit record is dominated by diagnoses related to severe neurological events (Secondary malignant neoplasm of brain and spinal cord, Subdural hemorrhage) and various oncological/infectious processes (Malignant neoplasm of bronchus and lung, unspecified; Unspecified essential hypertension; Unspecified acquired hypothyroidism). The medication profile is extensive, covering supportive care for these severe conditions (Potassium Chl, Famotidine, Insulin, Dexamethasone, Oxycodone-Acetaminophen, Fluticasone Propionate NASAL, Metoclopramide, Prochlorperazine, Acetaminophen, Sodium Chloride 0.9% Flush, Calcium Carbonate, Phenytoin Sodium, 0.9% Sodium Chloride, Spironolactone, Docusate Sodium, Levothyroxine Sodium, Ascorbic Acid, Lisinopril, Omeprazole, Influenza Virus Vaccine, Hydrochlorothiazide, Sertraline, Finasteride, Multivitamins, Calcium Gluconate, Magnesium Sulfate, Potassium Chloride, Lorazepam, Iso-Osmotic Dextrose, Vancomycin, Isotonic Sodium Chloride, Gentamicin, SW, Phenytoin, Aluminum-Magnesium Hydrox.-Simethicone, Heparin).
